name: Matthew Perry
title: Last known photo of Matthew Perry, a selfie posted to his Instagram on October 22, 2023 — six days before his death.
description: Matthew Perry posted this selfie to his Instagram on October 22, 2023, six days before his death. On October 28, he was found unresponsive in a jacuzzi at his home in Pacific Palisades, Los Angeles, and was pronounced dead at 4:17 PM. He was 54 years old. His death was later revealed to have been caused by the acute effects of ketamine. Perry had been receiving ketamine-assisted psychotherapy sessions to treat anxiety, with his last known session occurring the week before his death — though the medical examiner determined the ketamine in his system could not have been from that session, as the drug's half-life is only 3 to 4 hours. Other contributing factors included the effects of buprenorphine, drowning, and coronary artery disease.
bio: Matthew Perry was an American actor best known for his role as Chandler Bing on the sitcom "Friends". He was also a playwright and an advocate for addiction recovery, drawing on his own long struggle with substance abuse.

location.name: 18038 Blue Sail Dr, Pacific Palisades, CA 90272
